title: Prisioneros de la tierra
writer: Ulises Petit de Murat, Darío Quiroga, Horacio Quiroga
actors: Francisco Petrone, Ángel Magaña, Roberto Fugazot
plot: By 1915, a contractor traveling to Posadas looking for new staff. Among the music and drinks in a bar and shipped to the mill. He is accompanied by a drunken doctor and his daughter. In the mill, injustices and cruelties are accen...
